step_rationale: Resolvin E1 receptor mediates anti-inflammatory signaling; promotes plaque stabilization and inflammation resolution.
mechanism: ERV1 signaling suppresses macrophage activation and inflammatory cytokine production, stabilizing the atherosclerotic plaque.

references.title: ERV1/ChemR23 Signaling Protects Against Atherosclerosis by Modifying Oxidized Low-Density Lipoprotein Uptake and Phagocytosis in Macrophages.
